meaning: adj.有山形墙的,有人形墙的
examples: It is an archetypal shape, a simple mass with a gabled roof.
The building's gabled roof, pipework and internal structure were exposed.
You can see its pretty white gabled roof floating above a sea of corn stubble.
The Bishop family home in Braintree, at 46 Hollis Avenue, is a gabled Victorian with a gracious covered porch.
The most romantic of all Parisian restaurants, Le Coupe-Chou, is tucked inside a gabled medieval house, just two blocks away from my apartment.
